name: @clearline/icons
description: Clearline design system icon registry — 45 named glyphs as framework-agnostic data (viewBox/stroke-width/body), generated from icons.source.json (a copy of clearline-icons.json). Rendered by @clearline/ui's <Icon> foundation; carries no React or DOM dependency.

metadata.regenerate: Edit icons.source.json, then run `pnpm --filter @clearline/icons generate` to rebuild src/icon-registry.ts.
